# Figures

```{r map_bc, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.cap = map_bc_cap}
require(HerringData)
require(SpawnIndex)
require(rnaturalearth)
data(sections)
data(regions)
data(database_info)
areas <- load_area_data(
  reg = "All", db = database_info$herring_con, where = database_info$area_loc
)
polys <- load_sections(sections = sections, areas = areas)
bc_coast <- ne_countries(
  scale = "large", returnclass = "sf",
  country = c("Canada", "United States of America")
)
regions_major_long <- regions %>%
  filter(Type == "Major") %>%
  mutate(Region = paste0(Region, ")")) %>%
  unite("Long", RegionName, Region, sep = " (") %>%
  pull(Long)
regions_minor_long <- regions %>%
  filter(Type == "Minor") %>%
  mutate(Region = paste0(Region, ")")) %>%
  unite("Long", RegionName, Region, sep = " (") %>%
  pull(Long)
map_bc_cap <- paste(
  "Pacific Herring stock assessment regions (SARs) in British Columbia.",
  "The major SARs are ", paste_nicely(regions_major_long), ".",
  "The minor SARs are ", paste_nicely(regions_minor_long), "."
)
map_bc(shape_land = bc_coast, shape_sars = polys$regions)
```
